summary: Tested new Customer Loyalty & Merchant Features APIs. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Customer Loyalty APIs (/api/customer-loyalty/*) working correctly with VIP tiers (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum), points system, cashback, and referral codes. Merchant APIs (/api/merchant/*) working correctly for dashboard, products, coupons, staff, and commissions. Public merchant finder (/api/merchant/public/find) working without auth.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Customer Loyalty router correctly uses /api/customer-loyalty prefix (avoiding conflict with existing /api/loyalty)
✓ VIP Tiers properly defined: Bronze (1% cashback), Silver (2%), Gold (3%), Platinum (5%)
✓ Points multiplier system: Bronze 1x, Silver 1.5x, Gold 2x, Platinum 3x
✓ Referral system: €5 bonus for referrer, €2 for referred user
✓ Merchant auth uses wholesale_id from JWT token correctly
✓ Merchant dashboard aggregates transactions by today/week/month/all_time
✓ Product creation sets status='pending_approval' for admin review
✓ Coupon system supports percentage and fixed amount discounts
✓ Public merchant finder supports city and coordinate-based filtering
seed_data_creation: Created test product and coupon via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Loyalty APIs at /api/customer-loyalty/* (not /api/loyalty). Merchant APIs at /api/merchant/*. Merchant login via /api/wholesale/auth/login. VIP tiers: bronze/silver/gold/platinum with increasing cashback and points multipliers.

/api/customer-loyalty/status.returns: tier, tier_name, points, cashback_percent, benefits, referral_code, next_tier, amount_to_next_tier, all_tiers

/api/customer-loyalty/wallet-card.returns: card_type, customer_number, tier, points, balance, barcode, qr_data, apple/google wallet URLs

/api/merchant/dashboard.returns: merchant_name, today/this_week/this_month/all_time stats, unique_customers, top_products, staff_activity

/api/merchant/products.returns: products array with id, title, description, category, status

/api/merchant/coupons.returns: coupons array with code, discount_percent, min_purchase, max_uses, expires_at
